title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 302.460 - Manufacturer warning required
text:
302.460.  Manufacturer warning required. — The manufacturer shall affix to each ignition interlock device a label which shall contain a warning that any person tampering, circumventing or otherwise misusing the device is guilty of a class A misdemeanor.
(L. 1995 S.B. 102 § 6, A.L. 2014 S.B. 491) 
Transferred 2014; formerly 577.610; Effective 1-01-17
